references.hebrew: וְזָבַ֥חְתָּ פֶּ֛סַח לַיהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ צֹ֣אן וּבָקָ֑ר בַּמָּקוֹם֙ אֲשֶׁר־יִבְחַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה לְשַׁכֵּ֥ן שְׁמ֖וֹ שָֽׁם׃
references.english: You shall slaughter the passover sacrifice for the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God, from the flock and the herd, in the place where G<small>OD</small> will choose to establish the divine name.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאָכַלְתָּ֞ לִפְנֵ֣י ׀ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ בַּמָּק֣וֹם אֲשֶׁר־יִבְחַר֮ לְשַׁכֵּ֣ן שְׁמ֣וֹ שָׁם֒ מַעְשַׂ֤ר דְּגָֽנְךָ֙ תִּירֹשְׁךָ֣ וְיִצְהָרֶ֔ךָ וּבְכֹרֹ֥ת בְּקָרְךָ֖ וְצֹאנֶ֑ךָ לְמַ֣עַן תִּלְמַ֗ד לְיִרְאָ֛ה אֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ כׇּל־הַיָּמִֽים׃
commentary_links.english: You shall consume the tithes of your new grain and wine and oil, and the firstlings of your herds and flocks, in the presence of the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God, in the place where [God] will choose to establish the divine name, so that you may learn to revere the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God forever.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star ושלמים שם שם ממעשר ומינה מה

commentary_links.hebrew: וְזָבַחְתָּ֥ שְׁלָמִ֖ים וְאָכַ֣לְתָּ שָּׁ֑ם וְשָׂ֣מַחְתָּ֔ לִפְנֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
commentary_links.english: and you shall sacrifice there offerings of well-being and eat them, rejoicing before the E<small>TERNAL</small> your God.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star ושלמים שם שם ממעשר ומינה מה

commentary_links.hebrew: עַל־חַלֹּת֙ לֶ֣חֶם חָמֵ֔ץ יַקְרִ֖יב קׇרְבָּנ֑וֹ עַל־זֶ֖בַח תּוֹדַ֥ת שְׁלָמָֽיו׃
commentary_links.english: This offering, with cakes of leavened bread added, shall be offered along with their thanksgiving sacrifice of well-being.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְהָיָ֞ה כִּֽי־תָבֹ֣אוּ אֶל־הָאָ֗רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִתֵּ֧ן יְהֹוָ֛ה לָכֶ֖ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֵּ֑ר וּשְׁמַרְתֶּ֖ם אֶת־הָעֲבֹדָ֥ה הַזֹּֽאת׃
commentary_links.english: And when you enter the land that G<small>OD</small> will give you, as promised, you shall observe this rite.

commentary_links.hebrew: דַּבְּר֗וּ אֶֽל־כׇּל־עֲדַ֤ת יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר בֶּעָשֹׂ֖ר לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַזֶּ֑ה וְיִקְח֣וּ לָהֶ֗ם אִ֛ישׁ שֶׂ֥ה לְבֵית־אָבֹ֖ת שֶׂ֥ה לַבָּֽיִת׃
commentary_links.english: Speak to the whole community of Israelawhole community of Israel Or the leadership, on everyone’s behalf; cf. v. 21. and say that on the tenth of this month each family shall take for itself a lamb,blamb Or “kid.” Heb. seh means either “sheep” or “goat”; cf. v. 5. a lamb to a household.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: טעמא דלא אלימא קדושה דשלמים למיחל
